title: #Areas
text: #Areas Displays the number of areas, or polygons, that comprise this tag. If #Areas is greater than one, you can select a particular polygon of this tag and do one of the following: Click to separate the polygon from its tag. Uniface gives the separated polygon a new name which you can change. Click to separate and delete the polygon in one step. If #Areas is greater than one and you click to delete the selected polygon, Uniface deletes the polygon and the tag. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
